name: well-architected review: covers all six Well-Architected pillars
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));const names=j.pillars.map(p=>p.pillar);const want=["operational-excellence","security","reliability","performance-efficiency","cost-optimization","sustainability"];process.exit(want.every(w=>names.includes(w))&&j.pillars.length===6?0:1)' && echo six-pillars 1>&2
